member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.PinProfiler.IProfileAction
member.summary: Defines the interface of a profile action.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.PinProfiler.IProfileAction.Verify
member.summary: Verifies if the configuration for the profile action is valid.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.PinProfiler.PrimePinProfilerTestMethod
member.summary: This class is the test method to profile different pins (HDDPS, TDAU).

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.PinProfiler.PrimePinProfilerTestMethod.ModeType
member.summary: Defines the mode work types this test method has.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.PinProfiler.PrimePinProfilerTestMethod.ModeType.Start
member.summary: Defines the mode to start the profile of the given pin names and the given tag.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.PinProfiler.PrimePinProfilerTestMethod.ModeType.Stop
member.summary: Defines the mode to stop the profile of the given pin names and the given tag.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PinProfiler.PrimePinProfilerTestMethod.Mode
member.summary: Gets or sets the Mode parameter of the test method.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PinProfiler.PrimePinProfilerTestMethod.PinNames
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of pin names as comma separated. These can be HDDPS or TDAU pins.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PinProfiler.PrimePinProfilerTestMethod.Tag
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the profile to start or stop by this test method.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PinProfiler.PrimePinProfilerTestMethod.SamplingInterval
member.summary: Gets or sets the sampling rate of the profile in ms. Valid only for Start mode.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PinProfiler.PrimePinProfilerTestMethod.CallbackName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the callback to be triggered for ech tag.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.PinProfiler.PrimePinProfilerTestMethod.VerifyTag
member.summary: Verifies if the Tag parameter is valid.

members.member:
Initializes a new instance of the class.
The name of the tag for the profile. The sampling interval for the profile.. The list of pins. The name of the callback to be triggered for each tag. This session context. >

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.PinProfiler.ProfileStop.#ctor(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
